visual_description: A group of people in business attire are gathered in an office, some standing and others seated at desks, all facing toward a television screen mounted on a wall. Several individuals are visible in the foreground and background, with one man in a dark shirt walking past the camera while holding a phone to his ear. Most are looking forward toward the screen, with some appearing to be engaged in conversation or focused on their work.
audio_description: The audio features a female voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no significant background noise or inflection.
